properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v7 v10 v10 v11 v10 v10 v10 v12 v13

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We speak, strength into these weary bones We speak, the healing power of the Lord For in His name, there are miracles

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We speak, nothing is incurable 'Cause we know, that nothing is impossible For in His name, there are miracles

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Our God, is more than able Our God, will never fail He is always with us He is faithful'til the end

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We speak, happiness to be restored Rise up and give the glory to the Lord For in His name, there are miracles

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Our God is full of power Our God, the strongest tower He is always with us He is faithful'til the end

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We speak life, we speak life In the name of Jesus, there is healing Flowing in this place As we lift our voice in faith

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And we give all the praise To the One who's worthy of all glory Jesus is his name So we lift our voice in praise

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: We speak life, we speak life In the name of Jesus In the name of Jesus, there is healing Flowing in this place

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: As we lift our voice in faith Come on, give Him the highest praise!

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: We worship You Lord, we worship You Lord, we worship You, alone

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Oh, we worship You Lord, we worship You Lord, we worship You, alone

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: We stand in awe of You, God We stand in awe of You, God 'Cause He is worthy to be praised! 'Cause He is worthy to be praised!

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: We lift our voice to You, Jesus We lift up our hands to You, Jesus 'Cause You are to receive The highest praise
